title: ZENO Spirit Level 3 Set | Shock Proof Spirit Level Set | Torpedo Level with Magnetic Base | 3 Bubbles 45° 90° 180° | Yellow & Black | 300mm, 600mm, 1000mm
features: IDEAL FOR EVERY PROJECT - Includes 300mm, 600mm, and 1000mm spirit levels, making it versatile for various tasks, from hanging picture frames to tackling large-scale construction jobs with ease.
HIGHLY ACCURATE MEASUREMENTS - Each level is equipped with 3 precision vials for 45°, 90°, and 180° angles, ensuring accurate and reliable levelling for every application, no matter the scale.
BUILT TO WITHSTAND IMPACTS - Made with shock-proof materials designed to endure tough conditions, this set is built to last and delivers consistent performance, even on demanding job sites.
MAGNETIC BASE FOR EASY HANDLING - The strong magnetic base allows the levels to securely attach to metal surfaces, freeing your hands and making every task faster, safer, and more efficient.
LIGHTWEIGHT AND PRACTICAL DESIGN - Designed for comfort and portability, these spirit levels are easy to carry, simple to use, and essential for both DIY projects and professional work.
breadCrumbs: DIY & Tools > Power, Garden & Hand Tools > Measuring & Layout Tools > Levels > Spirit Levels
